[index.html](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/28314982/index.html)# cco-gelato
Selling gelato ice cream with Omani recipes
[Uploading i<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="ar" dir="rtl">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>COO® Gelato — جيلاتو حليب الإبل العُماني</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cairo:wght@300;400;600;700;900&family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;1,400&family=Space+Mono:wght@400;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
:root{
  --coo:#C1462B;--coo2:#A33A22;--cream:#FFF8F2;--peach:#FFE8DA;--sand:#FAF0E6;
  --dark:#2A1A10;--mid:#7A5040;--green:#1A7A5E;--amber:#D4840A;
  --purple:#7B3F94;--rose:#B52649;--brown:#924800;--white:#FFFFFF;
}
*,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0;}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth;}
body{font-family:'Cairo',sans-serif;background:var(--cream);color:var(--dark);overflow-x:hidden;}

/* ── OMANI BORDER STRIPS ── */
.omani-border-left,
.omani-border-right{
  position:fixed; top:0; bottom:0; width:52px; z-index:50;
  background-repeat:repeat-y;
  background-size:cover;
  pointer-events:none;
}
.omani-border-left{
  left:0;
  background-image:url("data:image/jpeg;base64,");
  background-position:center;
}
.omani-border-right{
  right:0;
  background-image:url("data:image/jpeg;base64,");
  background-position:center;
}
/* Push content away from borders */
body > *:not(.omani-border-left):not(.omani-border-right){
  margin-left:52px;
  margin-right:52px;
}

/* ── LANG TOGGLE ── */
.lang-btn{position:fixed;top:14px;left:72px;z-index:200;
  background:rgba(255,248,242,.95);border:1.5px solid rgba(193,70,43,.3);
  color:var(--coo);padding:6px 14px;border-radius:20px;
  font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;
  cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;letter-spacing:1px;backdrop-filter:blur(10px);}
.lang-btn:hover{background:var(--coo);color:white;}
body.en-mode .ar{display:none!important;}
body.ar-mode .en{display:none!important;}

/* ── NAV ── */
nav{position:fixed;top:0;right:52px;left:52px;z-index:100;
  background:rgba(255,248,242,.96);backdrop-filter:blur(20px);
  border-bottom:1px solid rgba(193,70,43,.12);
  padding:0 28px;height:62px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;
  margin:0!important;}
.nav-logo{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;text-decoration:none;}
.nav-c{width:38px;height:38px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--coo);
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-weight:700;font-size:11px;color:white;
  box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(193,70,43,.3);}
.nav-name{font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:2px;color:var(--coo);font-weight:700;}
.nav-links{display:flex;gap:22px;list-style:none;align-items:center;}
.nav-links a{font-size:14px;color:var(--mid);text-decoration:none;font-weight:700;transition:color .2s;}
.nav-links a:hover{color:var(--coo);}
.nav-order{background:var(--coo)!important;color:white!important;padding:9px 20px;
  border-radius:24px;font-weight:900!important;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(193,70,43,.3);}

/* ── HERO ── */
#home{min-height:100vh;padding-top:62px;margin:0 52px!important;
  background:radial-gradient(ellipse at 80% 15%,rgba(212,132,10,.12) 0%,transparent 55%),
             radial-gradient(ellipse at 5% 85%,rgba(193,70,43,.1) 0%,transparent 50%),var(--cream);
  display:flex;align-items:center;position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
.hero-w{max-width:1100px;margin:0 auto;padding:56px 28px;
  display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:56px;align-items:center;position:relative;z-index:1;width:100%;}
.hero-tag{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;
  background:rgba(193,70,43,.1);border:1px solid rgba(193,70,43,.28);
  color:var(--coo);padding:6px 16px;border-radius:20px;
  font-size:12px;letter-spacing:1px;font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;
  margin-bottom:20px;font-weight:700;animation:up .6s ease both;}
h1.ht{font-size:clamp(38px,4.8vw,68px);font-weight:900;line-height:1.08;
  color:var(--dark);margin-bottom:16px;animation:up .7s .08s ease both;}
h1.ht span{color:var(--coo);}
.hero-sub{font-size:15px;color:var(--mid);line-height:1.9;margin-bottom:28px;animation:up .7s .14s ease both;font-weight:400;}
.hero-btns{display:flex;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;animation:up .7s .2s ease both;}
.btn{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:13px 28px;border-radius:40px;
  font-family:'Cairo',sans-serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:800;text-decoration:none;
  border:none;cursor:pointer;transition:all .25s;}
.btn-m{background:var(--coo);color:white;box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(193,70,43,.3);}
.btn-m:hover{background:var(--coo2);transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 14px 32px rgba(193,70,43,.42);}
.btn-g{background:white;color:var(--dark);border:1.5px solid rgba(0,0,0,.12);}
.btn-g:hover{border-color:var(--coo);color:var(--coo);}
.launch-note{margin-top:20px;padding:13px 18px;background:rgba(193,70,43,.07);
  border-radius:12px;border-right:3px solid var(--coo);
  font-size:13px;color:var(--mid);line-height:1.8;animation:up .7s .26s ease both;font-weight:500;}

/* ── CUPS ── */
.cups-row{display:flex;gap:10px;align-items:flex-end;justify-content:center;animation:up .8s .18s ease both;}
.cup{width:90px;border-radius:18px;overflow:hidden;cursor:pointer;
  transition:transform .35s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1),box-shadow .35s;}
.cup:nth-child(3){transform:translateY(-18px) scale(1.09);}
.cup:hover{transform:translateY(-15px)!important;}
.cup-lid{height:20px;}
.cup-body{padding:12px 8px 11px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:4px;}
.cup-emoji{font-size:28px;}
.cup-logo{font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:white;opacity:.9;}
.cup-lbl{font-size:8px;font-weight:800;color:rgba(255,255,255,.8);letter-spacing:.7px;}
.milk-tag{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:3px;padding:2px 7px;
  border-radius:8px;font-size:7.5px;font-weight:700;
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.2);color:rgba(255,255,255,.88);}

/* ── OMANI DIVIDER ── */
.omani-div{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;margin:6px 0 40px;}
.omani-div::before,.omani-div::after{content:'';flex:1;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(to left,rgba(193,70,43,.35),transparent);}
.omani-div span{font-size:18px;}

/* ── SECTION ── */
.sec{max-width:1100px;margin:0 auto;padding:88px 28px;}
.sec-tag{font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:4px;
  color:var(--coo);font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:10px;}
.sec-title{font-size:clamp(28px,3.8vw,48px);font-weight:900;line-height:1.1;margin-bottom:8px;color:var(--dark);}
.sec-sub{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:17px;font-style:italic;
  color:var(--mid);margin-bottom:8px;opacity:.8;}

/* ── FLAVORS ── */
.fl-full{padding:88px 0;}
.fl-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(5,1fr);gap:14px;position:relative;z-index:1;}
.fl-card{border-radius:22px;overflow:hidden;cursor:pointer;
  box-shadow:0 6px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.1);transition:transform .3s,box-shadow .3s;background:white;
  position:relative;}
.fl-card:hover{transform:translateY(-14px);box-shadow:0 24px 56px rgba(0,0,0,.18);}
.fl-card::after{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0);transition:background .25s;border-radius:22px;pointer-events:none;}
.fl-card:hover::after{background:rgba(0,0,0,0.04);}
.fl-photo{height:195px;overflow:hidden;position:relative;}
.fl-photo img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;transition:transform .4s;}
.fl-card:hover .fl-photo img{transform:scale(1.06);}
.fl-milk{position:absolute;top:10px;right:10px;
  background:rgba(0,0,0,.45);backdrop-filter:blur(6px);color:white;
  font-size:8px;padding:3px 9px;border-radius:9px;
  font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-weight:700;z-index:2;letter-spacing:.4px;}
.fl-tap-hint{position:absolute;bottom:10px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);
  background:rgba(0,0,0,.4);backdrop-filter:blur(4px);color:white;
  font-size:9px;padding:3px 10px;border-radius:10px;white-space:nowrap;
  font-weight:600;z-index:2;opacity:0;transition:opacity .25s;}
.fl-card:hover .fl-tap-hint{opacity:1;}
.fl-bot{padding:14px 13px;}
.fl-name{font-size:15px;font-weight:900;color:var(--dark);margin-bottom:2px;}
.fl-tag{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-style:italic;font-size:11px;color:var(--mid);margin-bottom:8px;opacity:.75;}
.fl-desc-short{font-size:10.5px;color:#8A6550;line-height:1.5;margin-bottom:10px;font-weight:400;}
.fl-row{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;}
.fl-price{font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;}
.fl-price-note{font-size:9px;color:var(--mid);margin-top:2px;font-weight:500;}
.fl-add{width:30px;height:30px;border-radius:50%;border:none;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:16px;
  cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;color:white;font-weight:700;}
.fl-add:hover{transform:scale(1.18);}

/* ── FLAVOR MODAL ── */
.fl-modal{display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:1000;
  background:rgba(0,0,0,.7);backdrop-filter:blur(8px);
  align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:20px;
  margin:0!important;}
.fl-modal.open{display:flex;animation:fadeIn .3s ease;}
.fl-modal-inner{background:white;border-radius:28px;max-width:700px;width:100%;
  max-height:90vh;overflow-y:auto;position:relative;
  box-shadow:0 30px 80px rgba(0,0,0,.4);animation:slideUp .35s ease;}
.modal-close{position:absolute;top:16px;left:16px;z-index:10;
  background:rgba(0,0,0,.35);border:none;color:white;
  width:38px;height:38px;border-radius:50%;font-size:16px;
  cursor:pointer;transition:background .2s;font-weight:700;}
.modal-close:hover{background:rgba(0,0,0,.6);}
.modal-img-wrap{position:relative;height:280px;overflow:hidden;border-radius:28px 28px 0 0;}
.modal-img-wrap img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;}
.modal-img-overlay{position:absolute;inset:0;}
.modal-content{padding:28px 32px 32px;}
.modal-milk{font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:10px;color:var(--mid);
  letter-spacing:1px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:6px;}
.modal-name{font-size:30px;font-weight:900;color:var(--dark);margin-bottom:4px;line-height:1.15;}
.modal-tag{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-style:italic;font-size:16px;
  color:var(--coo);margin-bottom:12px;opacity:.85;}
.modal-price{font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:22px;font-weight:700;
  color:var(--coo);margin-bottom:16px;}
.modal-divider{text-align:center;margin:16px 0;}
.modal-desc{font-size:15px;color:#5A4030;line-height:1.9;margin-bottom:14px;font-weight:400;}
.modal-story{font-size:13px;color:var(--mid);background:var(--sand);
  padding:12px 16px;border-radius:12px;border-right:3px solid var(--coo);
  font-weight:500;line-height:1.7;}
.modal-order-btn{flex:1;background:var(--coo);color:white;border:none;
  padding:14px 24px;border-radius:14px;font-family:'Cairo',sans-serif;
  font-size:15px;font-weight:800;cursor:pointer;transition:all .25s;
  box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(193,70,43,.3);}
.modal-order-btn:hover{background:var(--coo2);transform:translateY(-1px);}
.modal-close-btn{background:var(--sand);color:var(--mid);border:1.5px solid rgba(0,0,0,.1);
  padding:14px 20px;border-radius:14px;font-family:'Cairo',sans-serif;
  font-size:14px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;}
.modal-close-btn:hover{border-color:var(--coo);color:var(--coo);}

/* ── EVENTS ── */
.ev-full{background:white;padding:88px 0;}
.event-hero{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--coo) 0%,#7A1A08 100%);
  border-radius:26px;padding:44px 40px;
  display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr auto;gap:32px;align-items:center;
  margin-bottom:36px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
.event-hero::before{content:'🛺';font-size:150px;position:absolute;
  right:-8px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);opacity:.07;line-height:1;}
.ev-h-title{font-size:30px;font-weight:900;color:white;margin-bottom:8px;line-height:1.2;position:relative;z-index:1;}
.ev-h-sub{font-size:14px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.72);line-height:1.7;position:relative;z-index:1;}
.ev-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:13px;}
.ev-card{background:var(--sand);border-radius:16px;padding:22px 18px;
  border:1.5px solid transparent;transition:all .25s;}
.ev-card:hover{border-color:var(--coo);background:var(--peach);}
.ev-icon{font-size:32px;margin-bottom:9px;}
.ev-title{font-size:15px;font-weight:800;color:var(--dark);margin-bottom:4px;}
.ev-desc{font-size:12px;color:var(--mid);line-height:1.6;font-weight:400;}

/* ── ORDER ── */
.ord-full{padding:88px 0;background:var(--peach);}
.ord-box{background:white;border-radius:26px;padding:44px 48px;
  box-shadow:0 14px 56px rgba(193,70,43,.1);max-width:720px;margin:0 auto;}
.form-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:15px;margin-bottom:15px;}
.fg{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;}
.fg.full{grid-column:1/-1;}
label{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--mid);letter-spacing:.4px;font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;}
input,select,textarea{background:var(--sand);border:1.5px solid rgba(193,70,43,.14);
  border-radius:11px;padding:11px 14px;color:var(--dark);
  font-family:'Cairo',sans-serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:500;outline:none;
  transition:border-color .2s,background .2s;width:100%;}
input:focus,select:focus,textarea:focus{border-color:var(--coo);background:white;}
select option{background:white;}
textarea{resize:vertical;min-height:80px;}
input[type=number]{-moz-appearance:textfield;text-align:center;font-weight:800;font-size:17px;}
input[type=number]::-webkit-outer-spin-button,
input[type=number]::-webkit-inner-spin-button{-webkit-appearance:none;}
.qty-wrap{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;}
.qty-btn{width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--coo);color:white;
  border:none;font-size:20px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;flex-shrink:0;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:background .2s;}
.qty-btn:hover{background:var(--coo2);}
.qty-note{font-size:11px;color:var(--mid);margin-top:4px;}
.fl-pick{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(5,1fr);gap:8px;}
.fl-tog{border:2px solid rgba(193,70,43,.14);border-radius:12px;
  padding:10px 5px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;
  background:var(--sand);transition:all .2s;user-select:none;}
.fl-tog:hover{border-color:var(--coo);background:var(--peach);}
.fl-tog.on{border-color:var(--coo);background:rgba(193,70,43,.1);}
.fl-tog .te{font-size:20px;margin-bottom:4px;}
.fl-tog .tn{font-size:9px;color:var(--mid);font-weight:700;}
.wa-btn{width:100%;background:#25D366;color:white;border:none;padding:16px;
  border-radius:13px;font-family:'Cairo',sans-serif;font-size:15px;font-weight:800;
  cursor:pointer;margin-top:24px;transition:all .25s;
  box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(37,211,102,.32);
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:10px;}
.wa-btn:hover{background:#1aad52;transform:translateY(-2px);}
.success{display:none;text-align:center;padding:44px 20px;}
.success.show{display:block;}

/* ── CONTACT ── */
.ct-full{padding:88px 0;background:var(--sand);}
.ct-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:44px;align-items:start;}
.ct-cards{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:11px;}
.cc{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;background:white;border-radius:15px;
  padding:16px 18px;box-shadow:0 3px 14px rgba(0,0,0,.06);text-decoration:none;
  transition:box-shadow .2s,transform .2s;border:1.5px solid transparent;}
.cc:hover{transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:0 9px 28px rgba(0,0,0,.1);}
.cc-ico{width:42px;height:42px;border-radius:12px;display:flex;align-items:center;
  justify-content:center;font-size:18px;flex-shrink:0;}
.cc-lbl{font-size:9px;color:#9A7060;letter-spacing:1.5px;font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:2px;}
.cc-val{font-size:15px;font-weight:800;color:var(--dark);direction:ltr;unicode-bidi:isolate;display:inline-block;}
.cc-sub{font-size:11px;color:#9A7060;margin-top:2px;font-weight:400;}
.map-wrap{border-radius:20px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 6px 28px rgba(0,0,0,.1);
  border:1.5px solid rgba(193,70,43,.14);}
.map-hdr{background:white;padding:13px 17px;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;
  border-bottom:1px solid rgba(193,70,43,.1);}
.map-title{font-size:13px;font-weight:800;color:var(--dark);}
.map-sub{font-size:10.5px;color:var(--mid);margin-top:2px;}
.map-link{background:var(--coo);color:white;padding:7px 14px;border-radius:16px;
  font-size:11px;font-weight:800;text-decoration:none;white-space:nowrap;
  font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;transition:background .2s;}
.map-link:hover{background:var(--coo2);}
.hours{margin-top:13px;background:white;border-radius:15px;padding:18px 20px;
  box-shadow:0 3px 14px rgba(0,0,0,.06);}
.foot-phone{direction:ltr;unicode-bidi:isolate;display:inline;}

/* ── FOOTER ── */
footer{background:var(--dark);padding:32px 28px;margin:0!important;}
.foot-in{max-width:1100px;margin:0 auto;
  display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:16px;}
.foot-logo{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;}
.foot-c{width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--coo);
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:white;}
.foot-brand{font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:2px;color:var(--coo);}
.foot-legal{font-size:11px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.28);}
.foot-dots{display:flex;gap:6px;}
.fd{width:10px;height:10px;border-radius:50%;}

/* ── REVEAL ── */
.rv{opacity:0;transform:translateY(24px);transition:opacity .6s ease,transform .6s ease;}
.rv.vis{opacity:1;transform:none;}

/* ── ANIMATIONS ── */
@keyframes up{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(22px);}to{opacity:1;transform:none;}}
@keyframes fadeIn{from{opacity:0;}to{opacity:1;}}
@keyframes slideUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(40px);}to{opacity:1;transform:none;}}

/* ── RESPONSIVE ── */
@media(max-width:900px){
  .omani-border-left,.omani-border-right{width:28px;}
  body > *:not(.omani-border-left):not(.omani-border-right){margin-left:28px;margin-right:28px;}
  nav{right:28px;left:28px;}
  #home{margin:0 28px!important;}
  .hero-w{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:40px;}
  .cups-row{flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:center;}
  .fl-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);}
  .ev-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}
  .ct-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
  .form-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
  .fl-pick{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);}
  .nav-links{display:none;}
  .event-hero{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
  .lang-btn{left:38px;}
}
@media(max-width:500px){
  .omani-border-left,.omani-border-right{width:18px;}
  body > *:not(.omani-border-left):not(.omani-border-right){margin-left:18px;margin-right:18px;}
  nav{right:18px;left:18px;}
  #home{margin:0 18px!important;}
  .fl-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}
}
</style>
</head>
<body class="ar-mode">

<!-- Omani Border Strips -->
<div class="omani-border-left"></div>
<div class="omani-border-right"></div>

<!-- Lang Toggle -->
<button class="lang-btn" onclick="toggleLang()">EN | عر</button>

<!-- NAV -->
<nav>
  <a href="#" class="nav-logo">
    <div class="nav-c">coo</div>
    <span class="nav-name">COO® GELATO</span>
  </a>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#flavors" class="ar">النكهات</a><a href="#flavors" class="en">Flavours</a></li>
    <li><a href="#events" class="ar">الفعاليات</a><a href="#events" class="en">Events</a></li>
    <li><a href="#contact" class="ar">تواصل معنا</a><a href="#contact" class="en">Contact</a></li>
    <li><a href="https://instagram.com/try.coo" target="_blank" style="font-size:18px;text-decoration:none;">📸</a></li>
    <li><a href="#order" class="nav-order ar">🍦 اطلب الآن</a><a href="#order" class="nav-order en">🍦 Order Now</a></li>
  </ul>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<section id="home">
  <div class="hero-w">
    <div>
      <div class="hero-tag">🐫 <span class="ar">حليب الإبل العُماني الطبيعي</span><span class="en">Natural Omani Camel Milk</span></div>
      <h1 class="ht ar">جيلاتو<br><span>عُماني</span><br>أصيل 🍦</h1>
      <h1 class="ht en">Authentic<br><span>Omani</span><br>Gelato 🍦</h1>
      <p class="hero-sub ar">5 نكهات عُمانية فاخرة — بحليب الإبل الطبيعي من المروج، وحليب مزون الأصيل. صُنع في عُمان بحب 🇴🇲</p>
      <p class="hero-sub en">5 premium Omani flavours — with natural camel milk from Al Marawah and Mazoon dairy. Made in Oman with love 🇴🇲</p>
      <div class="hero-btns">
        <a href="#order" class="btn btn-m ar">🍦 اطلب الآن</a>
        <a href="#order" class="btn btn-m en">🍦 Order Now</a>
        <a href="#flavors" class="btn btn-g ar">اكتشف النكهات</a>
        <a href="#flavors" class="btn btn-g en">Discover Flavours</a>
      </div>
      <div class="launch-note">
        <span class="ar">📍 <strong>متوفر الآن</strong> — وادي الخوض، مبنى بن عمير (نفط عُمان)<br>🛒 قريباً في السوبرماركت والأسواق العُمانية 2026</span>
        <span class="en">📍 <strong>Available Now</strong> — Wadi Al Khoudh, Bin Omair Building (OmanOil)<br>🛒 Coming soon to Omani supermarkets 2026</span>
      </div>
      <a href="https://instagram.com/try.coo" target="_blank"
        style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-top:14px;
        color:var(--coo);text-decoration:none;font-weight:700;font-size:13px;
        background:rgba(193,70,43,.08);padding:7px 15px;border-radius:20px;
        border:1px solid rgba(193,70,43,.2);transition:all .2s;"
        onmouseenter="this.style.background='rgba(193,70,43,.15)'" onmouseleave="this.style.background='rgba(193,70,43,.08)'">
        📸 @try.coo
      </a>
    </div>
    <div class="cups-row">
      <div class="cup" style="box-shadow:0 14px 36px rgba(181,38,73,.3)">
        <div class="cup-lid" style="background:#7A1530;"></div>
        <div class="cup-body" style="background:linear-gradient(160deg,#B52649,#5A0E20);">
          <div class="cup-emoji">🌹</div><div class="cup-logo">coo</div>
          <div class="cup-lbl ar">ورد</div><div class="cup-lbl en">ROSE</div>
          <div class="milk-tag">🥛 مزون</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="cup" style="box-shadow:0 14px 36px rgba(26,122,94,.3)">
        <div class="cup-lid" style="background:#0D3324;"></div>
        <div class="cup-body" style="background:linear-gradient(160deg,#1A7A5E,#061E13);">
          <div class="cup-emoji">🌿</div><div class="cup-logo">coo</div>
          <div class="cup-lbl ar">لبان</div><div class="cup-lbl en">LUBAN</div>
          <div class="milk-tag">🐫 المروج</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="cup" style="box-shadow:0 22px 50px rgba(212,132,10,.4)">
        <div class="cup-lid" style="background:#8A5200;"></div>
        <div class="cup-body" style="background:linear-gradient(160deg,#D4840A,#5A3000);">
          <div class="cup-emoji">🍯</div><div class="cup-logo">coo</div>
          <div class="cup-lbl ar">عسل</div><div class="cup-lbl en">HONEY</div>
          <div class="milk-tag">🐫 المروج</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="cup" style="box-shadow:0 14px 36px rgba(146,72,0,.3)">
        <div class="cup-lid" style="background:#5C2C00;"></div>
        <div class="cup-body" style="background:linear-gradient(160deg,#924800,#3A1800);">
          <div class="cup-emoji">🌴</div><div class="cup-logo">coo</div>
          <div class="cup-lbl ar">تمر</div><div class="cup-lbl en">DATE</div>
          <div class="milk-tag">🥛 مزون</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="cup" style="box-shadow:0 14px 36px rgba(123,63,148,.3)">
        <div class="cup-lid" style="background:#4A1270;"></div>
        <div class="cup-body" style="background:linear-gradient(160deg,#7B3F94,#2A0840);">
          <div class="cup-emoji">🍬</div><div class="cup-logo">coo</div>
          <div class="cup-lbl ar">حلوى</div><div class="cup-lbl en">HALWA</div>
          <div class="milk-tag">🥛 مزون</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FLAVOR MODALS -->

<div id="modal-luban" class="fl-modal" onclick="closeModal(event,'luban')">
  <div class="fl-modal-inner">
    <button class="modal-close" onclick="closeModal(null,'luban')">✕</button>
    <div class="modal-img-wrap">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="اللبان الحوجري">
      <div class="modal-img-overlay" style="background:linear-gradient(to bottom,#1A7A5E,#061E13);opacity:0.35;"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-content">
      <div class="modal-milk ar">🐫 المروج</div>
      <div class="modal-milk en">🐫 Al Marawah</div>
      <div class="modal-name ar">اللبان الحوجري 🌿</div>
      <div class="modal-name en">Hojari Frankincense 🌿</div>
      <div class="modal-tag ar">ذهب عُمان الأبيض</div>
      <div class="modal-tag en">White Gold of Oman</div>
      <div class="modal-price">4 ر.ع <span class="ar">· نصف كيلو</span><span class="en">· Half kg</span></div>
      <div class="modal-divider">
        <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><polygon points="12,2 14,9 21,9 15,14 17,21 12,17 7,21 9,14 3,9 10,9" fill="none" stroke="#C1462B" stroke-width="1.5"/></svg>
      </div>
      <div class="modal-desc ar">اللبان الحوجري هو أجود أنواع البخور العُماني، يُستخرج من جبال ظفار بعناية فائقة. استخدمنا اللبان الطبيعي في صناعة هذا الجيلاتو ليمنحك نكهة فريدة ومميزة لا تشبه أي شيء آخر.</div>
      <div class="modal-desc en">Hojari frankincense is the finest Omani incense, carefully harvested from the mountains of Dhofar. We used natural frankincense in crafting this gelato to give you a unique flavour unlike anything else.</div>
      <div class="modal-story ar">🌿 حصاد اللبان يدوياً من أشجار البوسيليا في جبال ظفار</div>
      <div class="modal-story en">🌿 Frankincense hand-harvested from Boswellia trees in Dhofar mountains</div>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:12px;margin-top:24px;flex-wrap:wrap;">
        <button class="modal-order-btn" onclick="pickFlavor('اللبان الحوجري 🌿','luban')">
          <span class="ar">🍦 اطلب هذه النكهة</span>
          <span class="en">🍦 Order This Flavour</span>
        </button>
        <button class="modal-close-btn" onclick="closeModal(null,'luban')">
          <span class="ar">رجوع</span><span class="en">Back</span>
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
<div id="modal-honey" class="fl-modal" onclick="closeModal(event,'honey')">
  <div class="fl-modal-inner">
    <button class="modal-close" onclick="closeModal(null,'honey')">✕</button>
    <div class="modal-img-wrap">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="عسل السدر الجبلي">
      <div class="modal-img-overlay" style="background:linear-gradient(to bottom,#D4840A,#5A3000);opacity:0.35;"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-content">
      <div class="modal-milk ar">🐫 المروج</div>
      <div class="modal-milk en">🐫 Al Marawah</div>
      <div class="modal-name ar">عسل السدر الجبلي 🍯</div>
      <div class="modal-name en">Sidr Mountain Honey 🍯</div>
      <div class="modal-tag ar">جبال الحجر العُمانية</div>
      <div class="modal-tag en">Al Hajar Mountains</div>
      <div class="modal-price">4 ر.ع <span class="ar">· نصف كيلو</span><span class="en">· Half kg</span></div>
      <div class="modal-divider">
        <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><polygon points="12,2 14,9 21,9 15,14 17,21 12,17 7,21 9,14 3,9 10,9" fill="none" stroke="#C1462B" stroke-width="1.5"/></svg>
      </div>
      <div class="modal-desc ar">عسل السدر من أنفس أنواع العسل في العالم، يُجمع من أزهار شجر السدر في جبال الحجر الشامخة. مزجناه مع حليب الإبل الطازج من المروج لنقدم لك جيلاتو استثنائياً يجمع أصالة عُمان.</div>
      <div class="modal-desc en">Sidr honey is one of the world's finest, collected from sidr tree flowers in the towering Al Hajar mountains. We blended it with fresh camel milk from Al Marawah to offer you an exceptional gelato combining Omani authenticity.</div>
      <div class="modal-story ar">🍯 عسل السدر يُجمع يدوياً في مواسم خاصة من جبال نزوى وبهلاء</div>
      <div class="modal-story en">🍯 Sidr honey hand-collected in special seasons from Nizwa and Bahla mountains</div>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:12px;margin-top:24px;flex-wrap:wrap;">
        <button class="modal-order-btn" onclick="pickFlavor('عسل السدر الجبلي 🍯','honey')">
          <span class="ar">🍦 اطلب هذه النكهة</span>
          <span class="en">🍦 Order This Flavour</span>
        </button>
        <button class="modal-close-btn" onclick="closeModal(null,'honey')">
          <span class="ar">رجوع</span><span class="en">Back</span>
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
<div id="modal-halwa" class="fl-modal" onclick="closeModal(event,'halwa')">
  <div class="fl-modal-inner">
    <button class="modal-close" onclick="closeModal(null,'halwa')">✕</button>
    <div class="modal-img-wrap">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="الحلوى العُمانية">
      <div class="modal-img-overlay" style="background:linear-gradient(to bottom,#7B3F94,#2A0840);opacity:0.35;"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-content">
      <div class="modal-milk ar">🥛 مزون</div>
      <div class="modal-milk en">🥛 Mazoon</div>
      <div class="modal-name ar">الحلوى العُمانية 🍬</div>
      <div class="modal-name en">Omani Halwa 🍬</div>
      <div class="modal-tag ar">التراث في كل قضمة</div>
      <div class="modal-tag en">Heritage in Every Bite</div>
      <div class="modal-price">4 ر.ع <span class="ar">· نصف كيلو</span><span class="en">· Half kg</span></div>
      <div class="modal-divider">
        <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><polygon points="12,2 14,9 21,9 15,14 17,21 12,17 7,21 9,14 3,9 10,9" fill="none" stroke="#C1462B" stroke-width="1.5"/></svg>
      </div>
      <div class="modal-desc ar">الحلوى العُمانية رمز الكرم والضيافة الأصيلة. صنعنا هذا الجيلاتو بإلهام من الحلوى التقليدية المصنوعة من الدبس والزعفران والهيل، لتحصل على تجربة عُمانية أصيلة في كل قضمة.</div>
      <div class="modal-desc en">Omani halwa is a symbol of generosity and authentic hospitality. We crafted this gelato inspired by traditional halwa made with molasses, saffron, and cardamom, giving you an authentic Omani experience in every bite.</div>
      <div class="modal-story ar">🍬 مستوحى من حلوى مسقط التقليدية المصنوعة في دكاكين الأجداد</div>
      <div class="modal-story en">🍬 Inspired by traditional Muscat halwa made in ancestral shops</div>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:12px;margin-top:24px;flex-wrap:wrap;">
        <button class="modal-order-btn" onclick="pickFlavor('الحلوى العُمانية 🍬','halwa')">
          <span class="ar">🍦 اطلب هذه النكهة</span>
          <span class="en">🍦 Order This Flavour</span>
        </button>
        <button class="modal-close-btn" onclick="closeModal(null,'halwa')">
          <span class="ar">رجوع</span><span class="en">Back</span>
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
<div id="modal-dates" class="fl-modal" onclick="closeModal(event,'dates')">
  <div class="fl-modal-inner">
    <button class="modal-close" onclick="closeModal(null,'dates')">✕</button>
    <div class="modal-img-wrap">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="تمر الخلاص">
      <div class="modal-img-overlay" style="background:linear-gradient(to bottom,#924800,#3A1800);opacity:0.35;"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-content">
      <div class="modal-milk ar">🥛 مزون</div>
      <div class="modal-milk en">🥛 Mazoon</div>
      <div class="modal-name ar">تمر الخلاص 🌴</div>
      <div class="modal-name en">Khalas Dates 🌴</div>
      <div class="modal-tag ar">فخر النخلة العُمانية</div>
      <div class="modal-tag en">Pride of the Omani Palm</div>
      <div class="modal-price">4 ر.ع <span class="ar">· نصف كيلو</span><span class="en">· Half kg</span></div>
      <div class="modal-divider">
        <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><polygon points="12,2 14,9 21,9 15,14 17,21 12,17 7,21 9,14 3,9 10,9" fill="none" stroke="#C1462B" stroke-width="1.5"/></svg>
      </div>
      <div class="modal-desc ar">تمر الخلاص من أشهر تمور عُمان وأكثرها حلاوةً وعطراً، يُزرع في واحات نزوى وسائر محافظات الداخلية. استخدمنا تمر الخلاص الطازج مع حليب مزون لنصنع جيلاتو يفوح بعطر النخيل العُماني.</div>
      <div class="modal-desc en">Khalas dates are among Oman's most famous, sweetest and most fragrant dates, grown in the oases of Nizwa and the interior. We used fresh Khalas dates with Mazoon milk to create a gelato that carries the scent of Omani palms.</div>
      <div class="modal-story ar">🌴 تمر الخلاص يُحصد في أكتوبر من نخيل نزوى وبهلاء والداخلية</div>
      <div class="modal-story en">🌴 Khalas dates harvested in October from Nizwa, Bahla and the interior palms</div>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:12px;margin-top:24px;flex-wrap:wrap;">
        <button class="modal-order-btn" onclick="pickFlavor('تمر الخلاص 🌴','dates')">
          <span class="ar">🍦 اطلب هذه النكهة</span>
          <span class="en">🍦 Order This Flavour</span>
        </button>
        <button class="modal-close-btn" onclick="closeModal(null,'dates')">
          <span class="ar">رجوع</span><span class="en">Back</span>
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
<div id="modal-rose" class="fl-modal" onclick="closeModal(event,'rose')">
  <div class="fl-modal-inner">
    <button class="modal-close" onclick="closeModal(null,'rose')">✕</button>
    <div class="modal-img-wrap">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="ورد الجبل الأخضر">
      <div class="modal-img-overlay" style="background:linear-gradient(to bottom,#B52649,#5A0E20);opacity:0.35;"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-content">
      <div class="modal-milk ar">🥛 مزون</div>
      <div class="modal-milk en">🥛 Mazoon</div>
      <div class="modal-name ar">ورد الجبل الأخضر 🌹</div>
      <div class="modal-name en">Green Mountain Rose 🌹</div>
      <div class="modal-tag ar">زهرة جبال الحجر</div>
      <div class="modal-tag en">Flower of Al Hajar</div>
      <div class="modal-price">4 ر.ع <span class="ar">· نصف كيلو</span><span class="en">· Half kg</span></div>
      <div class="modal-divider">
        <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><polygon points="12,2 14,9 21,9 15,14 17,21 12,17 7,21 9,14 3,9 10,9" fill="none" stroke="#C1462B" stroke-width="1.5"/></svg>
      </div>
      <div class="modal-desc ar">الورد العُماني الجبلي يتفتح في ربيع جبال الحجر على ارتفاعات شاهقة، يتميز بعطره الزكي وألوانه الزاهية. استخلصنا ماء الورد الطبيعي ومزجناه بحليب مزون الطازج لنهديك هذا الجيلاتو الرومانسي.</div>
      <div class="modal-desc en">Omani mountain rose blooms in spring on the high peaks of Al Hajar mountains, distinguished by its fragrant scent and vibrant colors. We extracted natural rosewater and blended it with fresh Mazoon milk to bring you this romantic gelato.</div>
      <div class="modal-story ar">🌹 الورد يُقطَّر في موسم الربيع لاستخلاص ماء الورد العُماني الأصيل</div>
      <div class="modal-story en">🌹 Roses distilled each spring to extract authentic Omani rosewater</div>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:12px;margin-top:24px;flex-wrap:wrap;">
        <button class="modal-order-btn" onclick="pickFlavor('ورد الجبل الأخضر 🌹','rose')">
          <span class="ar">🍦 اطلب هذه النكهة</span>
          <span class="en">🍦 Order This Flavour</span>
        </button>
        <button class="modal-close-btn" onclick="closeModal(null,'rose')">
          <span class="ar">رجوع</span><span class="en">Back</span>
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- FLAVORS -->
<div id="flavors" style="background:var(--sand);">
  <div class="sec" style="padding-top:0;padding-bottom:0;padding-top:88px;padding-bottom:88px;">
    <div class="sec-tag rv ar">🍦 النكهات</div>
    <div class="sec-tag rv en">🍦 Flavours</div>
    <h2 class="sec-title rv ar">اضغط على النكهة لتعرف أكثر 😋</h2>
    <h2 class="sec-title rv en">Tap a Flavour to Learn More 😋</h2>
    <div class="omani-div rv"><span>✦</span></div>
    <div class="fl-grid rv">

      <div class="fl-card" onclick="openModal('luban')">
        <div class="fl-photo">
          <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="اللبان الحوجري">
          <div class="fl-milk">🐫 المروج <span class="ar"> </span><span class="en"></span></div>
          <div class="fl-tap-hint ar">اضغط للتفاصيل 👆</div>
          <div class="fl-tap-hint en">Tap for details 👆</div>
        </div>
        <div class="fl-bot">
          <div class="fl-name ar">اللبان الحوجري</div>
          <div class="fl-name en">Hojari Frankincense</div>
          <div class="fl-tag ar">ذهب عُمان الأبيض</div>
          <div class="fl-tag en">White Gold of Oman</div>
          <div class="fl-row">
            <div>
              <div class="fl-price" style="color:#1A7A5E">4 ر.ع</div>
              <div class="fl-price-note ar">نصف كيلو · 500g</div>
              <div class="fl-price-note en">Half kg · 500g</div>
            </div>
            <button class="fl-add" style="background:#1A7A5E" onclick="event.stopPropagation();pick('اللبان الحوجري 🌿')">+</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="fl-card" onclick="openModal('honey')">
        <div class="fl-photo">
          <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="عسل السدر الجبلي">
          <div class="fl-milk">🐫 المروج <span class="ar"> </span><span class="en"></span></div>
          <div class="fl-tap-hint ar">اضغط للتفاصيل 👆</div>
          <div class="fl-tap-hint en">Tap for details 👆</div>
        </div>
        <div class="fl-bot">
          <div class="fl-name ar">عسل السدر الجبلي</div>
          <div class="fl-name en">Sidr Mountain Honey</div>
          <div class="fl-tag ar">جبال الحجر العُمانية</div>
          <div class="fl-tag en">Al Hajar Mountains</div>
          <div class="fl-row">
            <div>
              <div class="fl-price" style="color:#D4840A">4 ر.ع</div>
              <div class="fl-price-note ar">نصف كيلو · 500g</div>
              <div class="fl-price-note en">Half kg · 500g</div>
            </div>
            <button class="fl-add" style="background:#D4840A" onclick="event.stopPropagation();pick('عسل السدر الجبلي 🍯')">+</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="fl-card" onclick="openModal('halwa')">
        <div class="fl-photo">
          <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="الحلوى العُمانية">
          <div class="fl-milk">🥛 مزون <span class="ar"> </span><span class="en"></span></div>
          <div class="fl-tap-hint ar">اضغط للتفاصيل 👆</div>
          <div class="fl-tap-hint en">Tap for details 👆</div>
        </div>
        <div class="fl-bot">
          <div class="fl-name ar">الحلوى العُمانية</div>
          <div class="fl-name en">Omani Halwa</div>
          <div class="fl-tag ar">التراث في كل قضمة</div>
          <div class="fl-tag en">Heritage in Every Bite</div>
          <div class="fl-row">
            <div>
              <div class="fl-price" style="color:#7B3F94">4 ر.ع</div>
              <div class="fl-price-note ar">نصف كيلو · 500g</div>
              <div class="fl-price-note en">Half kg · 500g</div>
            </div>
            <button class="fl-add" style="background:#7B3F94" onclick="event.stopPropagation();pick('الحلوى العُمانية 🍬')">+</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="fl-card" onclick="openModal('dates')">
        <div class="fl-photo">
          <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="تمر الخلاص">
          <div class="fl-milk">🥛 مزون <span class="ar"> </span><span class="en"></span></div>
          <div class="fl-tap-hint ar">اضغط للتفاصيل 👆</div>
          <div class="fl-tap-hint en">Tap for details 👆</div>
        </div>
        <div class="fl-bot">
          <div class="fl-name ar">تمر الخلاص</div>
          <div class="fl-name en">Khalas Dates</div>
          <div class="fl-tag ar">فخر النخلة العُمانية</div>
          <div class="fl-tag en">Pride of the Omani Palm</div>
          <div class="fl-row">
            <div>
              <div class="fl-price" style="color:#924800">4 ر.ع</div>
              <div class="fl-price-note ar">نصف كيلو · 500g</div>
              <div class="fl-price-note en">Half kg · 500g</div>
            </div>
            <button class="fl-add" style="background:#924800" onclick="event.stopPropagation();pick('تمر الخلاص 🌴')">+</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="fl-card" onclick="openModal('rose')">
        <div class="fl-photo">
          <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="ورد الجبل الأخضر">
          <div class="fl-milk">🥛 مزون <span class="ar"> </span><span class="en"></span></div>
          <div class="fl-tap-hint ar">اضغط للتفاصيل 👆</div>
          <div class="fl-tap-hint en">Tap for details 👆</div>
        </div>
        <div class="fl-bot">
          <div class="fl-name ar">ورد الجبل الأخضر</div>
          <div class="fl-name en">Green Mountain Rose</div>
          <div class="fl-tag ar">زهرة جبال الحجر</div>
          <div class="fl-tag en">Flower of Al Hajar</div>
          <div class="fl-row">
            <div>
              <div class="fl-price" style="color:#B52649">4 ر.ع</div>
              <div class="fl-price-note ar">نصف كيلو · 500g</div>
              <div class="fl-price-note en">Half kg · 500g</div>
            </div>
            <button class="fl-add" style="background:#B52649" onclick="event.stopPropagation();pick('ورد الجبل الأخضر 🌹')">+</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- EVENTS -->
<div class="ev-full" id="events">
  <div class="sec" style="padding-top:0;padding-bottom:0;padding-top:88px;padding-bottom:88px;">
    <div class="sec-tag rv ar">🛺 الفعاليات</div>
    <div class="sec-tag rv en">🛺 Events</div>
    <h2 class="sec-title rv ar">عربتنا تجي لك 🎉</h2>
    <h2 class="sec-title rv en">Our Cart Comes to You 🎉</h2>
    <div class="omani-div rv"><span>✦</span></div>
    <div class="event-hero rv">
      <div style="position:relative;z-index:1;">
        <div class="ev-h-title ar">احجز عربة COO® لفعاليتك 🛺</div>
        <div class="ev-h-title en">Book a COO® Cart for Your Event 🛺</div>
        <div class="ev-h-sub ar">جيلاتو طازج · 5 نكهات · العربة مجهزة بالكامل — نصلك في أي مكان بعُمان</div>
        <div class="ev-h-sub en">Fresh gelato · 5 flavours · Fully equipped — we reach you anywhere in Oman</div>
        <a href="https://wa.me/96877444114?text=مرحباً،+أريد+حجز+عربة+COO+Gelato+لفعالية"
          target="_blank" class="btn" style="margin-top:20px;background:white;color:var(--coo);box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(0,0,0,.15);font-size:13px;position:relative;z-index:1;">
          <span class="ar">📱 واتساب للحجز — <span class="foot-phone">00968 7744 4114</span></span>
          <span class="en">📱 WhatsApp — <span class="foot-phone">00968 7744 4114</span></span>
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="ev-grid rv">
      <div class="ev-card"><div class="ev-icon">🎪</div><div class="ev-title ar">معارض وفعاليات</div><div class="ev-title en">Exhibitions & Events</div><div class="ev-desc ar">معارض الغذاء، المهرجانات الوطنية</div><div class="ev-desc en">Food expos, national festivals</div></div>
      <div class="ev-card"><div class="ev-icon">🏢</div><div class="ev-title ar">شركات ووزارات</div><div class="ev-title en">Companies & Ministries</div><div class="ev-desc ar">أيام المؤسسة والاحتفالات الرسمية</div><div class="ev-desc en">Corporate days & official events</div></div>
      <div class="ev-card"><div class="ev-icon">🎉</div><div class="ev-title ar">مناسبات خاصة</div><div class="ev-title en">Special Occasions</div><div class="ev-desc ar">أعراس، حفلات، تجمعات عائلية</div><div class="ev-desc en">Weddings, parties, gatherings</div></div>
      <div class="ev-card"><div class="ev-icon">🏨</div><div class="ev-title ar">فنادق ومنتجعات</div><div class="ev-title en">Hotels & Resorts</div><div class="ev-desc ar">بوفيهات وحفلات الاستقبال</div><div class="ev-desc en">Buffets and reception events</div></div>
      <div class="ev-card"><div class="ev-icon">🎓</div><div class="ev-title ar">مدارس وجامعات</div><div class="ev-title en">Schools & Universities</div><div class="ev-desc ar">حفلات التخرج والأنشطة الطلابية</div><div class="ev-desc en">Graduations & student activities</div></div>
      <div class="ev-card"><div class="ev-icon">🌿</div><div class="ev-title ar">مناطق سياحية</div><div class="ev-title en">Tourism Destinations</div><div class="ev-desc ar">نزوى، جبل شمس، مسندم، صلالة</div><div class="ev-desc en">Nizwa, Jebel Shams, Musandam, Salalah</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ORDER -->
<div class="ord-full" id="order">
  <div class="sec" style="padding-top:0;padding-bottom:0;padding-top:88px;padding-bottom:88px;">
    <div class="sec-tag rv ar" style="text-align:center">🍦 الطلب</div>
    <div class="sec-tag rv en" style="text-align:center">🍦 Order</div>
    <h2 class="sec-title rv ar" style="text-align:center">اطلب الآن 😍</h2>
    <h2 class="sec-title rv en" style="text-align:center">Order Now 😍</h2>
    <div class="omani-div rv"><span>✦</span></div>
    <div class="ord-box rv">
      <div id="order-form">
        <div class="form-grid">
          <div class="fg"><label class="ar">الاسم الكريم</label><label class="en">Full Name</label>
            <input type="text" id="f-name" placeholder="محمد السعيد"></div>
          <div class="fg"><label class="ar">رقم الهاتف / واتساب</label><label class="en">Phone / WhatsApp</label>
            <input type="tel" id="f-phone" placeholder="00968 XXXX XXXX" style="direction:ltr;"></div>
          <div class="fg"><label class="ar">نوع الطلب</label><label class="en">Order Type</label>
            <select id="f-type">
              <option value="personal" class="ar">طلب شخصي</option>
              <option value="personal" class="en">Personal Order</option>
              <option value="bulk" class="ar">كميات (مطعم / فندق)</option>
              <option value="bulk" class="en">Bulk (Restaurant / Hotel)</option>
              <option value="event" class="ar">فعالية / عربة متنقلة</option>
              <option value="event" class="en">Event / Mobile Cart</option>
              <option value="gift" class="ar">هدية</option>
              <option value="gift" class="en">Gift</option>
            </select></div>
          <div class="fg"><label class="ar">المنطقة</label><label class="en">Area</label>
            <select id="f-area">
              <option>مسقط — وادي الخوض</option>
              <option>مسقط — الموالح</option>
              <option>مسقط — روي / القرم</option>
              <option>مسقط — السيب</option>
              <option>نزوى / Nizwa</option>
              <option>صلالة / Salalah</option>
              <option>صحار / Sohar</option>
              <option>مسندم / Musandam</option>
              <option class="ar">أخرى / Other</option>
            </select></div>
          <div class="fg full">
            <label class="ar">الكمية (عدد العلب)</label><label class="en">Quantity (cups)</label>
            <div class="qty-wrap">
              <button class="qty-btn" onclick="changeQty(-1)">−</button>
              <input type="number" id="f-qty" value="1" min="1" max="999" style="max-width:70px;">
              <button class="qty-btn" onclick="changeQty(1)">+</button>
            </div>
            <div class="qty-note ar">أكثر من 10 علب؟ سنعطيك سعر خاص 😊</div>
            <div class="qty-note en">More than 10 cups? We'll give you a special price 😊</div>
          </div>
          <div class="fg full">
            <label class="ar">اختر النكهات 🍦</label><label class="en">Choose Flavours 🍦</label>
            <div class="fl-pick" id="fpick">
              <div class="fl-tog" data-fl="اللبان الحوجري 🌿" onclick="tog(this)"><div class="te">🌿</div><div class="tn ar">لبان</div><div class="tn en">Luban</div></div>
              <div class="fl-tog" data-fl="عسل السدر 🍯" onclick="tog(this)"><div class="te">🍯</div><div class="tn ar">عسل</div><div class="tn en">Honey</div></div>
              <div class="fl-tog" data-fl="الحلوى العُمانية 🍬" onclick="tog(this)"><div class="te">🍬</div><div class="tn ar">حلوى</div><div class="tn en">Halwa</div></div>
              <div class="fl-tog" data-fl="تمر الخلاص 🌴" onclick="tog(this)"><div class="te">🌴</div><div class="tn ar">تمر</div><div class="tn en">Dates</div></div>
              <div class="fl-tog" data-fl="ورد الجبل 🌹" onclick="tog(this)"><div class="te">🌹</div><div class="tn ar">ورد</div><div class="tn en">Rose</div></div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="fg"><label class="ar">وقت التسليم</label><label class="en">Delivery Time</label>
            <select id="f-time">
              <option class="ar">في أقرب وقت</option><option class="en">As soon as possible</option>
              <option class="ar">صباحاً (8–12)</option><option class="en">Morning (8–12)</option>
              <option class="ar">ظهراً (12–4)</option><option class="en">Afternoon (12–4)</option>
              <option class="ar">مساءً (4–10)</option><option class="en">Evening (4–10)</option>
            </select></div>
          <div class="fg"><label>&nbsp;</label></div>
          <div class="fg full"><label class="ar">ملاحظات / عنوان التسليم</label><label class="en">Notes / Delivery Address</label>
            <textarea id="f-notes" placeholder="العنوان أو أي طلبات خاصة... / Address or special requests..."></textarea></div>
        </div>
        <button class="wa-btn" onclick="sendWA()">
          <span style="font-size:20px;">💬</span>
          <span class="ar">أرسل الطلب عبر واتساب — <span class="foot-phone">00968 7744 4114</span></span>
          <span class="en">Send Order via WhatsApp — <span class="foot-phone">00968 7744 4114</span></span>
        </button>
        <p style="text-align:center;font-size:11.5px;color:#9A7060;margin-top:10px;">
          <span class="ar">سيفتح واتساب تلقائياً مع تفاصيل طلبك</span>
          <span class="en">WhatsApp will open automatically with your order details</span>
        </p>
      </div>
      <div class="success" id="order-ok">
        <div style="font-size:64px;margin-bottom:14px;">🎉</div>
        <div style="font-size:22px;font-weight:900;color:var(--green);margin-bottom:6px;" class="ar">جاري فتح واتساب!</div>
        <div style="font-size:22px;font-weight:900;color:var(--green);margin-bottom:6px;" class="en">Opening WhatsApp!</div>
        <div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--mid);line-height:1.7;" class="ar">سيرد عليك فريق COO® قريباً 🍦</div>
        <div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--mid);line-height:1.7;" class="en">The COO® team will respond soon 🍦</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- CONTACT & MAP -->
<div class="ct-full" id="contact">
  <div class="sec" style="padding-top:0;padding-bottom:0;padding-top:88px;padding-bottom:88px;">
    <div class="sec-tag rv ar">📞 تواصل معنا</div>
    <div class="sec-tag rv en">📞 Contact Us</div>
    <h2 class="sec-title rv ar">كيف تتواصل معنا؟</h2>
    <h2 class="sec-title rv en">How to Reach Us?</h2>
    <div class="omani-div rv"><span>✦</span></div>
    <div class="ct-grid rv">
      <div class="ct-cards">
        <a class="cc" href="https://wa.me/96877444114" target="_blank" style="border-color:rgba(37,211,102,.3);">
          <div class="cc-ico" style="background:rgba(37,211,102,.12);font-size:20px;">💬</div>
          <div><div class="cc-lbl">WHATSAPP</div>
          <div class="cc-val" style="color:#1aad52;">00968 7744 4114</div>
          <div class="cc-sub ar">اضغط للمحادثة الفورية ↗</div><div class="cc-sub en">Tap to chat ↗</div></div>
        </a>
        <a class="cc" href="tel:+96877444114">
          <div class="cc-ico" style="background:rgba(193,70,43,.1);color:var(--coo);">📞</div>
          <div><div class="cc-lbl">PHONE</div>
          <div class="cc-val">00968 7744 4114</div>
          <div class="cc-sub ar">اضغط للاتصال</div><div class="cc-sub en">Tap to call</div></div>
        </a>
        <a class="cc" href="tel:+96895972223">
          <div class="cc-ico" style="background:rgba(0,0,0,.05);">🏢</div>
          <div><div class="cc-lbl">MANAGEMENT</div>
          <div class="cc-val">00968 9597 2223</div>
          <div class="cc-sub ar">للشراكات الرسمية</div><div class="cc-sub en">For official partnerships</div></div>
        </a>
        <a class="cc" href="mailto:Muhannad4455@gmail.com">
          <div class="cc-ico" style="background:rgba(193,70,43,.1);color:var(--coo);">📧</div>
          <div><div class="cc-lbl">EMAIL</div>
          <div class="cc-val" style="font-size:13px;">Muhannad4455@gmail.com</div>
          <div class="cc-sub ar">اضغط للمراسلة</div><div class="cc-sub en">Tap to email</div></div>
        </a>
        <a class="cc" href="https://goo.gl/maps/ZKLqv83fTdjHa7ef7" target="_blank" style="border-color:rgba(193,70,43,.2);">
          <div class="cc-ico" style="background:rgba(193,70,43,.12);color:var(--coo);font-size:18px;">📍</div>
          <div><div class="cc-lbl">LOCATION</div>
          <div class="cc-val ar">نفط عُمان — وادي الخوض</div><div class="cc-val en">OmanOil — Wadi Al Khoudh</div>
          <div class="cc-sub ar">مبنى بن عمير ↗</div><div class="cc-sub en">Bin Omair Building ↗</div></div>
        </a>
        <a class="cc" href="https://instagram.com/try.coo" target="_blank">
          <div class="cc-ico" style="background:rgba(193,70,43,.1);font-size:18px;">📸</div>
          <div><div class="cc-lbl">INSTAGRAM</div>
          <div class="cc-val" style="color:var(--coo);">@try.coo</div>
          <div class="cc-sub ar">تابعونا ↗</div><div class="cc-sub en">Follow us ↗</div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div>
        <a href="https://goo.gl/maps/ZKLqv83fTdjHa7ef7" target="_blank" style="display:block;text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="map-wrap" style="cursor:pointer;transition:transform .25s,box-shadow .25s;"
            onmouseenter="this.style.transform='translateY(-4px)';this.style.boxShadow='0 16px 48px rgba(193,70,43,.2)'"
            onmouseleave="this.style.transform='none';this.style.boxShadow=''">
            <div class="map-hdr">
              <div>
                <div class="map-title ar">📍 المعمل ومنفذ البيع</div>
                <div class="map-title en">📍 Factory & Store</div>
                <div class="map-sub ar">نفط عُمان — وادي الخوض، مبنى بن عمير</div>
                <div class="map-sub en">OmanOil — Wadi Al Khoudh, Bin Omair Building</div>
              </div>
              <span class="map-link ar" style="pointer-events:none;">افتح الخريطة ↗</span>
              <span class="map-link en" style="pointer-events:none;">Open Map ↗</span>
            </div>
            <iframe src="https://maps.google.com/maps?q=Wadi+Al+Khoudh+Muscat+Oman+OmanOil&z=15&output=embed"
              width="100%" height="280" style="border:0;display:block;" allowfullscreen="" loading="lazy"></iframe>
          </div>
        </a>
        <div class="hours" style="margin-top:13px;">
          <div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:800;color:var(--dark);margin-bottom:10px;">🕐 <span class="ar">أوقات العمل</span><span class="en">Working Hours</span></div>
          <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;">
            <span style="color:var(--mid);" class="ar">السبت – الجمعة</span>
            <span style="color:var(--mid);" class="en">Saturday – Friday</span>
            <span style="font-weight:800;color:var(--coo);" class="ar">11 صباحاً – 10 مساءً</span>
            <span style="font-weight:800;color:var(--coo);" class="en">11 AM – 10 PM</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div style="margin-top:13px;background:white;border-radius:15px;padding:18px 20px;
          box-shadow:0 3px 14px rgba(0,0,0,.06);border:1.5px solid rgba(255,102,0,.2);">
          <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:13px;margin-bottom:13px;">
            <div style="width:42px;height:42px;border-radius:12px;background:#FF6600;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:20px;flex-shrink:0;">🛵</div>
            <div>
              <div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:800;color:var(--dark);" class="ar">توصيل عبر طلبات</div>
              <div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:800;color:var(--dark);" class="en">Delivery via Talabat</div>
              <div style="font-size:10px;color:#FF6600;font-weight:700;font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;">Talabat Delivery</div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:5px;">
            <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--dark);padding:5px 8px;background:var(--peach);border-radius:7px;text-align:center;font-weight:600;">الخوض</div>
            <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--dark);padding:5px 8px;background:var(--peach);border-radius:7px;text-align:center;font-weight:600;">الخوض 6</div>
            <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--dark);padding:5px 8px;background:var(--peach);border-radius:7px;text-align:center;font-weight:600;">الموالح</div>
            <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--dark);padding:5px 8px;background:var(--peach);border-radius:7px;text-align:center;font-weight:600;">الموالح الشمالية</div>
            <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--dark);padding:5px 8px;background:var(--peach);border-radius:7px;text-align:center;font-weight:600;">الحيل الشمالية</div>
            <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--dark);padding:5px 8px;background:var(--peach);border-radius:7px;text-align:center;font-weight:600;">الحيل الجنوبية</div>
            <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--dark);padding:5px 8px;background:var(--peach);border-radius:7px;text-align:center;font-weight:600;">السيب</div>
            <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--dark);padding:5px 8px;background:var(--peach);border-radius:7px;text-align:center;font-weight:600;">معبيلة الجنوبية</div>
            <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--dark);padding:5px 8px;background:var(--peach);border-radius:7px;text-align:center;font-weight:600;grid-column:1/-1;">واحة المعرفة</div>
          </div>
          <a href="https://www.talabat.com" target="_blank"
            style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:8px;
            margin-top:12px;padding:11px;border-radius:11px;background:#FF6600;
            color:white;text-decoration:none;font-weight:800;font-size:13px;
            box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(255,102,0,.3);"
            onmouseenter="this.style.background='#E05500'" onmouseleave="this.style.background='#FF6600'">
            <span class="ar">🛵 اطلب عبر طلبات</span>
            <span class="en">🛵 Order via Talabat</span>
          </a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- FOOTER -->
<footer>
  <div class="foot-in">
    <div class="foot-logo">
      <div class="foot-c">coo</div>
      <div>
        <div class="foot-brand">COO® GELATO</div>
        <div class="foot-legal" style="margin-top:3px;">نماء الخوض ش.م.م · <span class="foot-phone">00968 7744 4114</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <a href="https://instagram.com/try.coo" target="_blank" style="color:var(--coo);text-decoration:none;font-weight:700;font-size:13px;">📸 @try.coo</a>
    <div class="foot-legal ar">© 2026 COO® — جميع الحقوق محفوظة</div>
    <div class="foot-legal en">© 2026 COO® — All rights reserved</div>
    <div class="foot-dots">
      <div class="fd" style="background:#1A7A5E;box-shadow:0 0 6px #1A7A5E88;"></div>
      <div class="fd" style="background:#D4840A;box-shadow:0 0 6px #D4840A88;"></div>
      <div class="fd" style="background:#7B3F94;box-shadow:0 0 6px #7B3F9488;"></div>
      <div class="fd" style="background:#924800;box-shadow:0 0 6px #92480088;"></div>
      <div class="fd" style="background:#B52649;box-shadow:0 0 6px #B5264988;"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</footer>

<script>
// LANG
function toggleLang(){
  const b=document.body;
  const isAr=b.classList.contains('ar-mode');
  b.classList.toggle('ar-mode',!isAr);
  b.classList.toggle('en-mode',isAr);
  b.setAttribute('dir',isAr?'ltr':'rtl');
  document.documentElement.lang=isAr?'en':'ar';
  document.querySelector('.lang-btn').textContent=isAr?'عر | AR':'EN | عر';
}
// MODAL
function openModal(id){
  document.getElementById('modal-'+id).classList.add('open');
  document.body.style.overflow='hidden';
}
function closeModal(e,id){
  if(e&&e.target!==document.getElementById('modal-'+id))return;
  document.getElementById('modal-'+id).classList.remove('open');
  document.body.style.overflow='';
}
function pickFlavor(name,id){
  closeModal(null,id);
  document.querySelectorAll('.fl-tog').forEach(t=>{if(t.dataset.fl===name)t.classList.add('on');});
  setTimeout(()=>document.getElementById('order').scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth'}),300);
}
// REVEAL
const obs=new IntersectionObserver(entries=>{
  entries.forEach((e,i)=>{if(e.isIntersecting)setTimeout(()=>e.target.classList.add('vis'),i*60);});
},{threshold:.08,rootMargin:'0px 0px -40px 0px'});
document.querySelectorAll('.rv').forEach(el=>obs.observe(el));
// QTY
function changeQty(d){const el=document.getElementById('f-qty');el.value=Math.max(1,Math.min(999,parseInt(el.value||1)+d));}
// PICK
function pick(name){document.querySelectorAll('.fl-tog').forEach(t=>{if(t.dataset.fl===name)t.classList.add('on');});document.getElementById('order').scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth'});}
function tog(el){el.classList.toggle('on');}
// WHATSAPP
function sendWA(){
  const name=document.getElementById('f-name').value.trim();
  const phone=document.getElementById('f-phone').value.trim();
  if(!name||!phone){alert('⚠️ '+(document.body.classList.contains('ar-mode')?'الرجاء إدخال الاسم ورقم الهاتف':'Please enter your name and phone number'));return;}
  const qty=document.getElementById('f-qty').value;
  const area=document.getElementById('f-area').value;
  const time=document.getElementById('f-time').value;
  const notes=document.getElementById('f-notes').value.trim();
  const selected=[...document.querySelectorAll('.fl-tog.on')].map(t=>t.dataset.fl).join('، ')||'لم تُحدد';
  const typeMap={personal:'طلب شخصي',bulk:'كميات',event:'فعالية / عربة',gift:'هدية'};
  const type=typeMap[document.getElementById('f-type').value]||'طلب';
  const msg=['🍦 *طلب جديد — COO® Gelato*','━━━━━━━━━━━━━',
    `👤 ${name}`,`📞 ${phone}`,`📦 ${type}`,`📍 ${area}`,
    `🔢 ${qty} علبة · 💰 ${(parseInt(qty)*4).toFixed(3)} ر.ع`,
    `🍦 ${selected}`,`🕐 ${time}`,notes?`📝 ${notes}`:'',
    '━━━━━━━━━━━━━','trycoo.netlify.app'
  ].filter(Boolean).join('\n');
  document.getElementById('order-form').style.display='none';
  document.getElementById('order-ok').classList.add('show');
  setTimeout(()=>window.open('https://wa.me/96877444114?text='+encodeURIComponent(msg),'_blank'),600);
}
// FADE IN
document.body.style.opacity='0';
window.addEventListener('load',()=>{document.body.style.transition='opacity .5s ease';document.body.style.opacity='1';});
// ESC to close modal
document.addEventListener('keydown',e=>{if(e.key==='Escape')document.querySelectorAll('.fl-modal.open').forEach(m=>m.classList.remove('open'));document.body.style.overflow='';} );
</script>
</body>
</html>ndex.html…]()
